rooms.name: EXAMINATION CENTER
rooms.directions: Large vertical block on the left.

rooms.name: LH211
rooms.directions: Located at the top left corner.

rooms.name: LH212
rooms.directions: Located at the top right corner.

rooms.name: BTL09
rooms.directions: Main biotech lab on the left.

rooms.name: LH-311
rooms.directions: Located at the top left corner of the 3rd floor.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.directions: Located at the top center of the 3rd floor.

rooms.name: LH-312
rooms.directions: Located at the top right corner of the 3rd floor.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.directions: Located at the top center of the 3rd floor, directly across from the main stairs.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.directions: Located at the bottom section, left side.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.directions: Located in the lower section, near the center.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.directions: Located in the lower section, near the center.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right, cross the center area to the left side of the building, then turn right and walk to the very top.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left towards the left side of the building, turn right and walk all the way up.
iii. LIFT: Turn left to the left wall, then turn right and walk all the way up.

rooms.name: CSL 06
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right, cross over to the left side of the floor, turn right and walk past CSL 05.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left towards the left hallway, turn right and walk straight up past the Washroom.
iii. LIFT: Turn left to the left hallway, turn right and walk past CSL 05.

rooms.name: CSL 05
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right, cross over to the left area, turn right and it will be on your left.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left to the left side, turn right and walk past the Washroom.
iii. LIFT: Turn left across the hall, then turn right and it is immediately there.

rooms.name: WASHROOM
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and cross straight into the middle intersection, it is right there.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left to the left hallway, turn right and walk past the HOD.
iii. LIFT: Turn left and walk straight, the washroom is exactly in front of you.

rooms.name: CSE HOD
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right, walk towards the Washroom, then turn left.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left to the left hallway, turn right and walk past CSL 03.
iii. LIFT: Turn left, walk straight, and it is immediately on your right.

rooms.name: CSL 03
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right, cross towards the left side, turn left and walk past the HOD.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left to the left hallway, and turn right to walk past CSL 04.
iii. LIFT: Turn left to the left side, then turn left to walk past the HOD.

rooms.name: CSL 04
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right, cross to the left side, turn left and walk all the way down past CSL 03.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left to the left side, and it is the first room on your left.
iii. LIFT: Turn left to the left side, turn left and walk to the very end.

rooms.name: ISL 03
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn left and walk up past ISL 02.
ii. Stairs-2: Walk straight ahead along the right side passing the middle area.
iii. LIFT: Turn right, then turn left and walk past ISL 02.

rooms.name: ISL 02
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn left, and it is the very first room on your right.
ii. Stairs-2: Walk straight ahead along the right side, just past the middle intersection.
iii. LIFT: Turn right, then turn left. It is immediately on your right.

rooms.name: ISL 01
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and walk down past the Server Room.
ii. Stairs-2: Walk straight ahead past CSL 02.
iii. LIFT: Turn right, then turn right and walk down. It is on your left.

rooms.name: CSL 02
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and walk down past ISL 01.
ii. Stairs-2: Walk straight ahead. It is the first room on your right.
iii. LIFT: Turn right, then turn right and walk down past ISL 01.

rooms.name: CSL 01
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and walk all the way straight down to the end.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn right, and it is immediately there on your right.
iii. LIFT: Turn right, then turn right and walk all the way down to the end.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Walk forward and turn left, go all the way to the top wall, then turn left again.
ii. Stairs-2: Walk straight ahead through the entire building to the top wall, then turn left.
iii. LIFT: Turn right, walk all the way to the top, then turn left.

rooms.name: CSL 07
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn left and walk straight ahead to the very end.
ii. Stairs-2: Walk straight ahead along the right side of the building all the way to the top.
iii. LIFT: Turn right, and walk straight all the way to the top.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right, cross to the left hallway, turn right to go up. It is on your right.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left to the left hallway, turn right and walk past the Washroom. It is on your right.
iii. LIFT: Turn left to the left hallway, turn right to go up. It is on your right.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn left and walk slightly up. It is on your left.
ii. Stairs-2: Walk straight ahead along the right hallway past the middle intersection. It is on your left.
iii. LIFT: Turn right to the right hallway, turn left to go up. It is on your left.

rooms.name: STAIRS-1
rooms.directions: Exit to your right into the hallway.

rooms.name: LIFT
rooms.directions: Exit straight forward into the center intersection.

rooms.name: UPS ROOM
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right, cross to the left hallway, turn left to walk down. It is on your left.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left to the left hallway, turn right to walk up. It is on your right.
iii. LIFT: Turn left to the left hallway, turn left to walk down. It is on your left.

rooms.name: SERVER ROOM
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right to walk down the hallway. It is on your right.
ii. Stairs-2: Walk straight ahead along the right hallway, and it is on your left.
iii. LIFT: Turn right to the right hallway, turn right to walk down. It is on your right.

rooms.name: ISL 04
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right, cross to the left side, turn left and walk to the very end.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left, and it is immediately there straight ahead on your left.
iii. LIFT: Turn left to the left side, turn left and walk to the very end.

rooms.name: STAIRS-2
rooms.directions: Exit straight forward into the bottom corridor.

rooms.name: LH-505
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn left and pass LH-504 and LH-506. Turn left through the gap between the two staff rooms, walk straight, and then turn right to reach the classroom.
ii. Stairs-2: turn left and follow along the path,pass along two staff rooms and the ISE HOD ,and LH-503 ,continue staright ahead to find LH-505
iii. LIFT: turn left.you will see the ISE HOD;turn right again to pass LH-503 continue staright ahead to find LH-505

rooms.name: LH-503
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and then turn right again. You will see the ISE HOD straight ahead; walk towards it and then turn left to reach LH-503.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left and then turn right. Walk along the two staff rooms and the ISE HOD; LH-503 is located immediately after the ISE HOD.
iii. LIFT: Turn left and then turn right again to reach the LH-503 classroom.

rooms.name: ISE HOD
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and then turn right again. Look straight ahead to find the ISE HOD.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left and then turn right. Pass along the two staff rooms; the ISE HOD will be directly ahead.
iii. LIFT: Turn left to find the ISE HOD exactly in front of you.

rooms.name: STAFF ROOM
rooms.description: Auxiliary staff room for department faculty.

rooms.name: CSL08
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and pass along LH-502 and LH-500. Continue past Stairs-2; CSL08 is located immediately next to the Library.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn left and pass the Library; CSL08 is located immediately next to the Library.
iii. LIFT: Turn right and then turn right again. Pass along LH-502 and LH-500, continue past Stairs-2 and the Library; CSL08 is located immediately ahead.

rooms.name: LH-506
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn left and pass along LH-504; LH-506 is the next classroom straight ahead.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn right and pass along LH-500, LH-502, and LH-504; LH-506 is the next classroom straight ahead.
iii. LIFT: Turn right and then turn left. Pass along LH-504; LH-506 is the next classroom straight ahead.

rooms.name: LH-504
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and then turn left to reach the classroom immediately.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn right and then turn left. Pass LH-500 and LH-502; LH-504 is the next classroom straight ahead.
iii. LIFT: Turn right and then turn left to reach the classroom.

rooms.name: LH-502
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and walk forward to find LH-502; LH-501 is on the opposite side.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn right and then turn left to reach LH-502; LH-501 is on the opposite side.
iii. LIFT: Turn right and then turn right again to find LH-502; LH-501 is on the opposite side.

rooms.name: LH-500
rooms.directions:
• From Stairs-1 or LIFT: Turn right, walk straight, and pass LH-502.
• From Stairs-2: Turn right to reach the classroom immediately.

rooms.name: Stairs-1
rooms.directions:
1. Turn right.
2. Walk straight.
3. Pass from LIFT and LH-502.
4. Reach LH-500.

rooms.name: LIFT
rooms.directions:
1. Exit and turn right.
2. Walk straight and pass LH-502.
3. LH-500 will be ahead.

rooms.name: LH-501
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and walk forward to find LH-502; LH-501 is on the opposite side.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn right and then turn left to reach LH-502; LH-501 is on the opposite side.
iii. LIFT: Turn right and then turn right again to find LH-502; LH-501 is on the opposite side.

rooms.name: LIBRARY
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and pass along LH-502 and LH-500; the Library is located beside Stairs-2.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn sharp left to reach the Library.
iii. LIFT: Turn right and then turn right again. Pass along LH-502 and LH-500; the Library is located beside Stairs-2.

rooms.name: CFR03
rooms.directions:
i. Stairs-1: Turn right and pass along LH-502 and LH-500. The CFR03 Lab is located right beside the LH-500 classroom.
ii. Stairs-2: Turn right to find the Lab immediately beside LH-500.
iii. LIFT: Turn right and then turn right again. Pass along LH-502 and LH-500; the CFR03 Lab is located right beside LH-500.
